abilities.name: Vile Transference
abilities.flavor: The Vampire Lord siphons the animus from nearby enemies and uses it to rejuvenate their ageless form.
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, roll a number of dice equal to the target’s Health characteristic. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target and Heal (1) this unit.

weapons.name: Murderous Fangs and Talons Crit (2 Hits)

abilities.name: The Scent Of Gore
abilities.flavor: The taste of hot blood on the tongue sends these abominations into a killing mania.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for attacks made by this unit that target a damaged unit.

abilities.name: Skeleton Legion
abilities.flavor: As necromantic energies blanket the battlefield, long-dead warriors stagger to their feet once more, eye sockets aglow with killing light.
abilities.effect: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.

abilities.name: Riders Of Ruin
abilities.flavor: Blood Knights barge through lesser foes to strike at more worthy challengers.
abilities.effect: Models in this unit can pass across enemy INFANTRY models as if this unit had FLY .

battleTraits.name: Swoop Down
battleTraits.summary: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units
